item.title: Comparative Analysis of the Detection of Dairy Cows During Drinking Events Using YOLOv5, YOLOS, YOLOv7, and YOLOv8 Models
item.description: Citation: [24] V.S. Mukunda, A.B. Jagadale, M.B. Girmay, S. Mashelkar, F. Möhrle, F.K. Burkhardt, J.J. Hayer, J. Dörr, J. Steinhoff-Wagner “Comparative Analysis of the Detection of Dairy Cows During Drinking Events Using YOLOv5, YOLOS, YOLOv7, and YOLOv8 Models” 62. Jahrestagung der Bayerischen Arbeitsgemeinschaft Tierernährung e.V. Tagungsband „Digitale Technologien und intelligente Systeme in der Fütterung landwirtschaftlicher Nutztiere“, pp. 44-53, 2024.
